headline: McCormick Releases 2025 Purpose-led Performance Report, Strengthening Business Resilience and Long-Term Value Through Measurable Progress Across Its Commitments
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a global leader in flavor, today released its 2025 Purpose-led Performance (PLP) Report, demonstrating how sustainability investments are strengthening supply continuity, operational efficiency, and long-term growth. The report marks the completion of its 2025 commitments and highlights measurable progress across responsible sourcing, climate action, operational resilience, and employee wellbeing.
